channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/5/29)
channel.description: 嘿！今天的信息量不小，但别担心，我已经帮你把跟 AI、LLM、Agent 和 Coding 最相关的干货都挑出来了。看得出来，**AI Coding Agent** 和 **Claude Code** 生态是今天绝对的焦点，既有深度的技术分享，也有很多实用的工具和讨论。来看看哪些值得你花时间：

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿！今天的信息量不小，但别担心，我已经帮你把跟 AI、LLM、Agent 和 Coding 最相关的干货都挑出来了。看得出来，**AI Coding Agent** 和 **Claude Code** 生态是今天绝对的焦点，既有深度的技术分享，也有很多实用的工具和讨论。来看看哪些值得你花时间：

item.title: study8677/awesome-architecture
item.description: 🗺️ Think like a software architect, not just a coder — 21 architecture maps (incl. AI gateway, RAG, agents, inference serving, vector DB) + a language-agnostic system-design tutorial. Every template links to real open-source prototypes. 中英文双语。 | 近期热门 | 总 744 stars
item.author: study8677

item.title: UditAkhourii/adhd
item.description: ADHD — a skill for coding agents. Tree-of-thought with pruning, built on the Claude Agent SDK. Fans out parallel divergent thoughts under different cognitive frames, scores, prunes traps, deepens the survivors. The no-brainer skill for creative and interdisciplinary work. | 近期热门 | 总 477 stars
item.author: UditAkhourii

item.title: withkynam/vibecode-pro-max-kit
item.description: Your AI forgets. This remembers. Spec-driven coding harness for vibecoders, product owners, CEOs and real builders — self-improving context memory, 12 agents, 32 skills. Kills context rot, ships features, not spaghetti. Claude Code & Codex. Any stack. 30 seconds | 近期热门 | 总 320 stars
item.author: withkynam

item.title: bryanyzhu/agentic-ai-system-course
item.description: Use agent to learn agent - A skeleton course on how to design, build, and operate production AI agents | 近期热门 | 总 287 stars
item.author: bryanyzhu

item.title: Sophomoresty/gemini-web2api
item.description: Convert Google Gemini web into OpenAI-compatible API. Zero auth, cross-platform, single file. | 近期热门 | 总 273 stars
item.author: Sophomoresty

item.title: MatinSenPai/SenPaiScanner
item.description: A light-weight scanner for Cloudflare IPs, written in Golang | 近期热门 | 总 224 stars
item.author: MatinSenPai

item.title: akitaonrails/ai-usagebar
item.description: Rust-based waybar widget to monitor status of Claude, GPT, GLM, OpenRouter plans/credits - inspired by claudebar/codexbar | 近期热门 | 总 99 stars
item.author: akitaonrails

item.title: bitan-del/zap
item.description: Zap — high-performance CLI proxy that filters command output to save 60-90% AI tokens | 近期热门 | 总 94 stars
item.author: bitan-del

item.title: Robinhood Agentic Trading - 让您的智能体进行交易
item.author: Robinhood Agentic Trading

item.title: Parastore - 使用LLM驱动的合成消费者模拟真实商店
item.author: Parastore
